_comment: NPC: Sword Tomb Keeper (剑冢守卫). INFERRED. Soul Refining Sect. Location: soul_refining_sect_sword_tomb.
name: Sword Tomb Keeper
personality: ancient, weary, has guarded the tomb for centuries
initiation_lines: These swords once belonged to cultivators. Their spirits remain. Approach with respect.
The ancestor forged his first soul banner from the spirit of a sword that refused to die.
Iron and bone maintain the tomb's seals. If the seals break, the sword spirits will roam free.
I have guarded this tomb for three hundred years. My own sword lies among them now. I simply forgot which one.

sect_tasks.name: Tomb Seal Maintenance
sect_tasks.description: The sword tomb seals need iron and bone to prevent sword spirits from escaping.

sect_tasks.name: Sword Spirit Tribute
sect_tasks.description: Offer emeralds and obsidian to calm the restless sword spirits.
